title: Broken Waystone
narrative: A cracked waystone sends you down a dead road until the tracks vanish in thorn and scree.

title: Rotten Bridge
narrative: The bridge gives way underfoot, dropping supplies and pride into the dark below.

title: False Campfire
narrative: A welcoming fire proves to be a lure. You escape the trap, but not without bruises.

title: Swallowed Trail
narrative: The ground slumps into a hidden sinkhole and forces a long, painful climb back out.

title: Spoiled Rations
narrative: Your food spoils in the damp air, and hunger turns every mile into work.

title: Night Panic
narrative: Something screams beyond the firelight. Sleep breaks apart and the morning comes heavy.

title: Blighted Water
narrative: A foul stream looked clean enough in the dark. By dawn, your stomach knows better.

title: Falling Stones
narrative: Loose stones tear down from above, forcing you to cover up and crawl through dust.

title: Wrong Star
narrative: You follow the wrong star for hours before the horizon proves the mistake.

title: Snapped Strap
narrative: A pack strap snaps on a steep descent, scattering gear across sharp stones.

title: Hostile Weather
narrative: A sudden wall of weather batters the road until shelter becomes the only choice.

title: Thief In The Dark
narrative: A shadow slips through camp. You keep your life, but lose time chasing the thief away.

title: Sickly Fog
narrative: A grey fog burns the lungs and turns the path into a maze of close shapes.

title: Ruin Collapse
narrative: An old arch collapses as you pass, clipping your shoulder and burying the trail.

title: Bad Omen
narrative: Every sign points wrong: dead birds, split stones, and a road that seems to resist you.

title: Predator Circle
narrative: Hungry shapes stalk the edge of sight until you take a costly detour.

title: Quicksand Pocket
narrative: The road turns soft and treacherous, dragging boots and gear into sucking mud.

title: Cursed Marker
narrative: A roadside marker chills your blood and leaves a lingering ache in every joint.

title: Lost Bearings
narrative: Landmarks repeat in impossible order. It takes half a day to find the true road.

title: Bitter Fall
narrative: One bad step sends you hard to the ground, and the route punishes the mistake.

title: Washed-Out Road
narrative: Rain has chewed the road into rivulets, forcing slow steps and careful footing.

title: Doubtful Tracks
narrative: The tracks split and double back. You lose time sorting the true path from old prints.

title: Heavy Pack
narrative: The pack rides badly today, and every adjustment costs another stretch of road.

title: Crowded Pass
narrative: Merchants, carts, and nervous guards clog the pass until patience is the only weapon.

title: Cold Breakfast
narrative: A poor camp and colder meal leave you slow to rise and slower to move.

title: Twisted Milestone
narrative: Someone turned the milestone. You catch the trick, but only after losing distance.

title: Low Visibility
narrative: Dust and dim light blur the route, making every fork a small argument.

title: Stubborn Gate
narrative: An old toll gate hangs shut. It takes more effort than skill to pry it open.

title: Muddy Climb
narrative: The climb is slick, slow, and mean enough to ruin any good pace.

title: Suspicious Shrine
narrative: A roadside shrine watches silently. You circle wide, unwilling to test its patience.

title: Bad Map Ink
narrative: Rain smears a map note into nonsense, and the route has to be guessed again.

title: Old Barricade
narrative: A fallen barricade blocks the direct path and makes you pick through splintered wood.

title: Noisy Wildlife
narrative: Unseen animals crash through the brush, keeping you alert and slowing each step.

title: Loose Gravel
narrative: Loose gravel turns a straight descent into a careful shuffle.

title: Tangled Brambles
narrative: A bramble patch crosses the trail and refuses to give up the road quickly.

title: Wrong Ferry
narrative: The ferry is gone from its mooring, so the crossing becomes a search for another way.

title: Worn Boots
narrative: A boot seam complains with every step, demanding frequent stops and tighter laces.

title: Argument At Camp
narrative: Travelers ahead argue over the road and block the best line through.

title: Dead End Spur
narrative: A promising side path ends at a cliff and gives nothing back but lost time.

title: Faint Headwind
narrative: The wind is never violent, only constant, pressing against every mile.

title: Steady Road
narrative: The road holds firm, the signs make sense, and the miles pass at a fair pace.

title: Clear Ford
narrative: A shallow ford lets you cross without drama and keep the route moving.

title: Friendly Marker
narrative: Fresh cairns guide you through rough ground with confidence.

title: Good Weather
narrative: The sky stays open and calm, lending the route an honest rhythm.

title: Quiet Camp
narrative: A quiet camp restores focus and lets you start the next stretch cleanly.

title: Sound Bearings
narrative: The land matches the map, and the route bends exactly where it should.

title: Helpful Sign
narrative: A carved sign points the way and saves you from guessing at the next fork.

title: Even Ground
narrative: For once, the land asks only that you walk it.

title: Old Patrol Road
narrative: An old patrol road remains intact enough to carry you forward.

title: Known Landmark
narrative: A familiar landmark confirms your route and steadies your confidence.

title: Light Supplies
narrative: Careful packing pays off and the day's load feels manageable.

title: Travelers' Advice
narrative: A pair of travelers share a useful warning about a rough bend ahead.

title: Short Rest
narrative: A sheltered hollow gives you a moment to breathe before moving on.

title: Fresh Water
narrative: Clean water runs beside the path, making the next miles easier.

title: Stable Ground
narrative: The ground stays stable through a difficult stretch and you pass without incident.

title: Roadside Lanterns
narrative: Old lantern posts still mark the safe side of the road.

title: Measured Pace
narrative: You keep a measured pace and spend no energy fighting the road.

title: Good Instinct
narrative: A quick instinct keeps you on the best fork before doubt can slow you.

title: Open View
narrative: A high ridge grants a clean view of the next stretch of route.

title: Untroubled Mile
narrative: Nothing rises against you. The route simply continues.

title: Hidden Shortcut
narrative: A narrow cut between stones skips a long bend in the road.

title: Traveler's Cache
narrative: A cleverly hidden cache waits beneath a stack of marked stones.

title: Scout's Ridge
narrative: You climb to a ridge and spot a faster line through the terrain.

title: Found Herbs
narrative: Useful herbs grow beside the path and leave you steadier than before.

title: Abandoned Satchel
narrative: An abandoned satchel contains something worth carrying onward.

title: Clear Animal Trail
narrative: A game trail cuts cleanly toward your destination.

title: Lucky Crossing
narrative: You reach the crossing at the perfect moment and move through without waiting.

title: Quiet Shrine Gift
narrative: A small shrine seems to approve of your passage and offers a useful trinket.

title: Old Smuggler Path
narrative: A hidden smuggler path bypasses patrols, rubble, and wasted time.

title: Helpful Guide
narrative: A local guide trades directions for a story and points you to a better route.

title: Supply Crate
narrative: A forgotten supply crate sits half-buried near the road.

title: Wind At Your Back
narrative: The wind shifts behind you and the day suddenly feels easier.

title: Good Campfire Tale
narrative: A shared campfire tale reveals a landmark most travelers miss.

title: Hidden Spring
narrative: A hidden spring gives clean water and a better line through the land.

title: Lost Courier Bag
narrative: A courier's lost bag contains a useful prize and a clue to the road ahead.

title: Fast Descent
narrative: You find a stable descent that cuts hours from the route.

title: Keen Navigation
narrative: Sharp navigation lets you chain one good landmark into the next.

title: Useful Remnant
narrative: A ruined campsite still holds something useful for the road.

title: Safe Backroad
narrative: A backroad avoids the worst terrain and carries you forward quickly.

title: Road Wisdom
narrative: Experience turns a difficult stretch into a series of easy decisions.

title: Ancient Cache
narrative: A sealed cache opens to your hand as if it waited for the right traveler.

title: Perfect Shortcut
narrative: You discover a perfect shortcut that cuts a whole dangerous stretch from the trip.

title: Blessed Rest
narrative: A rare safe haven restores your strength and steadies your spirit.

title: Hero's Find
narrative: A glint beneath the road dust reveals a prize worth remembering.

title: Guiding Star
narrative: A bright star aligns with the road and leads you without hesitation.

title: Hidden Waygate
narrative: An old waygate hums awake and folds distance into a single strange step.

title: Pilgrim's Blessing
narrative: A grateful pilgrim marks your brow with a blessing and sends you onward renewed.

title: Masterful Route
narrative: Every choice lands true, and the route opens like it wants you to arrive.

title: Forgotten Armory
narrative: A hidden armory niche contains a road-worn but valuable item.

title: Guardian Aid
narrative: A silent guardian spirit clears danger from your path and leaves a warm trace behind.

title: Rare Merchant
narrative: A rare merchant caravan shares supplies and a path known to few.

title: Secret Causeway
narrative: A submerged causeway rises just long enough for you to cross.

title: Lucky Relic
narrative: A lost relic gleams beside the path, humming with useful fortune.

title: Clear Prophecy
narrative: An old inscription describes the very road ahead and the safest way through it.

title: Healing Rain
narrative: A clean rain falls only where you walk, cooling wounds and brightening the road.

title: Treasure Sign
narrative: A mark only adventurers notice points to a small but real treasure.

title: Swift Caravan
narrative: A swift caravan lets you travel in guarded company for the best stretch of road.

title: Road Opens
narrative: Obstacles seem to clear before you reach them, turning the journey almost effortless.

title: Champion's Cache
narrative: A cache marked by an old champion yields gear meant for hard roads.

title: Fated Arrival
narrative: The final miles fall away with uncanny ease, as if fate itself wants you elsewhere.
